nodes.name: .env
nodes.summary: Environment variables for DataImpulse mobile proxy configuration, defining PROXY_URL and PROXY_LIST endpoints for web scraping traffic routing.

nodes.name: ecosystem.config.js
nodes.summary: PM2 process manager configuration for the product-scraper service, running a FastAPI/uvicorn app on port 8106 with proxy environment variables, restart limits, and minimum uptime guard.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency manifest listing FastAPI, uvicorn, pydantic, httpx, Playwright, and Pillow — the core stack for an HTTP API-driven product scraper with browser automation and image processing.
